name: Junk Drawer 5-Minute Reset Card
description: Creates a printable timer-based junk drawer reset card with keep, move, trash, and caution micro-zones for a five-minute visible win.
use_cases: Reset one junk drawer in five minutes.
Create keep, move, trash, and caution micro-zones.
Make a low-friction printable for a small household win.
safety_notes: Keep the scope to a five-minute micro reset of one drawer.
Do not turn the task into donation planning, resale sorting, or a major declutter project.
Tell the user to handle sharp, unknown, leaking, broken, battery, chemical, or fragile items carefully.
Do not give hazardous waste, repair, legal, medical, or professional safety advice.
